activities_projects.title: Types of Farming Identification
activities_projects.objective: Understand different types of farming practiced in India
steps: Read about primitive subsistence farming, intensive subsistence farming and commercial farming
Write two features of each farming type
Give one example region in India for each type
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students learn the classification and characteristics of farming systems

activities_projects.title: Cropping Seasons Chart
steps: Create a table for Rabi, Kharif and Zaid seasons
List at least three crops grown in each season
Mention the months when each season occurs
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand seasonal agricultural patterns in India

activities_projects.title: Major Crops of India
activities_projects.objective: Identify important crops grown in India
steps: List five major crops such as rice, wheat, maize, pulses and millets
Write the season in which each crop is grown
Mention one major producing state for each crop
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students gain knowledge about major food crops of India

activities_projects.title: Plantation Agriculture Study
activities_projects.objective: Understand plantation crops and their characteristics
steps: Choose two plantation crops such as tea and coffee
Write the climatic conditions required for their growth
Mention the states where they are grown
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand plantation agriculture in India

activities_projects.title: Map Activity – Crop Distribution
activities_projects.objective: Locate major crop-producing regions in India
steps: Mark rice-producing regions
Mark wheat-producing regions
Label two major states for each crop
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students develop map-reading and geographical skills

activities_projects.title: Food vs Non-Food Crops
activities_projects.objective: Differentiate between food crops and non-food crops
steps: Write five food crops grown in India
Write three non-food crops such as cotton, jute and rubber
Explain the uses of each crop
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand crop classification based on usage

activities_projects.title: Agricultural Products Around Us
activities_projects.objective: Identify agricultural products used in daily life
steps: List five items used at home that come from agriculture
Identify the crop from which each item is produced
Explain how the crop is useful
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students connect agriculture with everyday life

activities_projects.title: Green Revolution Exploration
activities_projects.objective: Understand the impact of agricultural reforms
steps: Write the meaning of Green Revolution
List two technologies used in this revolution
Mention one benefit for farmers

activities_projects.title: Government Schemes for Farmers
steps: Find two government schemes for farmers
Write their purpose
Explain how they help farmers
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand government initiatives for agriculture

activities_projects.title: Crop Research Activity
steps: Choose one crop grown in India
Write about its climate requirements
Explain its importance in Indian agriculture
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students develop research skills and subject understanding
